qEnglish: What is the fractional form of 0.123?
explanationHindi: आवर्ती दशमलव के लिए सूत्र: (संख्या - अनावर्ती भाग) / (उतने ही 9 जितने आवर्ती अंक, उतने ही 0 जितने अनावर्ती अंक)। 0.123 = (123-12)/900 = 111/900 = 37/300।
explanationEnglish: For recurring decimal: (number - non-repeating part) / (as many 9's as repeating digits, followed by as many 0's as non-repeating digits). 0.123 = (123-12)/900 = 111/900 = 37/300.
subject: गणित
